subparts.text: Illustrate any two sources used for literature review.
Mention any two types of research design.
What is a nominal scale? Give one example.
What is a Type I error in hypothesis testing?
State any one method to calculate the mean and briefly explain its utility.
What is plagiarism in the context of report writing?
Mention any two components of a research report layout.

questions.question_text: Explain the steps involved in the research process with a flow diagram.
What is a hypothesis? How do you formulate a hypothesis in business research? Support your answer with example.
Explain various types of measurement and scaling techniques used in business research.
Discuss the steps involved in designing a questionnaire. What are the characteristics of a good questionnaire?
Explain the procedure of testing a hypothesis using t-test. Illustrate with example.
What is sampling? Explain different sampling techniques used in data analysis.
Discuss the structure and layout of a standard research report.
Explain the steps involved in writing a research report. How are citations and bibliography handled?
